data.title: Preplanning UX reference injection: story-level design guidance from reference library
data.description:
Follow-on epic stub — needs /dso:brainstorm before implementation (scrutiny:pending).

## Context
When preplanning decomposes UI-related epics into user stories, agents currently have no structured design guidance to draw on for story-level UX detail. This epic integrates ref-query.sh into preplanning to inject story-level UX guidance — anti-patterns as acceptance criteria candidates, USWDS component recommendations, and applicable WCAG 2.2 compliance requirements keyed by story type. Lighter integration than design review; focuses on what detail preplanning needs to write good done-definitions.

## Success Criteria
- Preplanning queries .claude/scripts/dso ref-query at Summary + Detail tier for UI-related stories
- Anti-patterns relevant to the story domain appear as acceptance criteria candidates
- USWDS component and WCAG 2.2 compliance requirements are injected per story type
- Non-UI stories are not affected; injection is scoped to stories with UI components

## Dependencies
- Epic 0b7c-d811 (ref-query.sh retrieval contract) must be complete before this epic can be implemented
